title: Agent Interaction Policy Request
description: Resolve-hint body for the authenticated interaction-policy endpoint. additionalProperties:true — the resolver reads the documented keys and may ignore unknown top-level hints while keeping nested policy objects strict.

schema_version.description: Stable request-shape label for interaction-policy resolution.

harness.description: Calling coding harness requesting the resolved policy.

skill.description: Optional skill or workflow identifier the agent plans to use.

task_intent.description: Optional task-intent hint for choosing the interaction policy.

pace_cues.description: Optional lexical or behavioral cues that imply a preferred pace.

confidence.description: Optional resolver confidence for the observed signals bundle.

allow_persist.description: Whether the resolver may persist the inferred profile.

allow_telemetry.description: Whether the resolver may emit interaction-policy telemetry.
